final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster cover for 小红书 (Xiaohongshu / RED) announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, flat graphic design with bold typographic hierarchy, inspired by Wallpaper* and Kinfolk layout restraint
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and text blocks arranged along a strong diagonal axis from upper-left to lower-right, creating dynamic tension; portrait 9:16 aspect
Subject: bold announcement typography featuring "GPT-image-2" as the dominant headline and "Lovart" as the secondary brand name, paired with a minimal abstract graphic motif suggesting AI image generation (geometric light refraction or pixel-to-art transition)
Scene/backdrop: clean solid or near-solid background with a single high-contrast accent color plane cutting diagonally across the frame
Lighting/mood: flat editorial lighting, no photographic shadows; mood is confident, modern, and premium
Color palette: deep near-black as the base, one high-contrast accent color (electric cobalt blue or vivid magenta) as the diagonal slash element, pure white for primary text — three-color maximum for luxury restraint
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: text "GPT-image-2" must be the largest typographic element; "Lovart" must be clearly legible as a secondary brand callout; diagonal layout must be visually dominant; design must read clearly as a social media cover at thumbnail size
Avoid: gradients that muddy contrast, drop shadows, stock-photo backgrounds, busy textures, more than three colors, generic tech circuit-board motifs, cluttered layout
